dashboard.title: My Aquariums
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your tank profiles. This data will automatically be used by the Plant, Algae, and Disease Expert AI for precise analysis.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Add your first aquarium profile to unlock advanced AI features.

hints.name: Give it a unique name (e.g., Nature Desktop).
hints.tankType: Style influences AI plant and fish recommendations.
hints.setupDate: Crucial for detecting New Tank Syndrome.
hints.isPrimary: AI Assistant will use this tank as the default reference context.
hints.dimensions: Used by AI to calculate Light/Liter ratio and fish stocking limits.
hints.filter: Filtration capacity helps AI analyze ammonia spikes and algae risks.
hints.light: Photoperiod duration is critical for photosynthesis and algae analysis.
hints.co2: BPS (Bubble per second). Leave blank if not using pressurized CO2.
hints.maintenance: Water Change & Fertilizer routines are key metrics for AI root cause analysis.
